title: So Retro
body:
- Are you stuck in previous versions because you yearn for the old days?
- Do you prefer the old, pre-1.13 textures?
- Do you miss certain features, like the old combat system?

![creeper and spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5bba593ea4c9c765295b47dc27939080c491ccd.png)

If any or all of the above apply to you, his Modpack might be for you!
Coming with various remodels, retextures and complete overhauls of certain mobs and blocks to fit more with the old, rough looking but somewhat charming aestethic!

So Retro comes with various performance-enhancing mods as well as built-in controller support and on-the-fly skin swapping! No longer will you have to close the game to change your skin, like on legacy console edition.

For the legacy console players, the pack comes with a shader that makes your game resemble the beloved console edition even more. Though, be warned, it might impact performance.



_-Known issues: Sculk Sensor Remodel culls the sides of the block it's next to, will fix by remodeling it yet again in an upcoming patch_


**Freesound Credit to NoahBangs**
[https://freesound.org/people/NoahBangs/sounds/706897/](https://freesound.org/people/NoahBangs/sounds/706897/)

**Legacy Shader Possible thanks to creator CrushedPixel**
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zgGl-xLlOcs&t=177s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zgGl-xLlOcs&t=177s) 
(In the video, he says to just credit the shader, which I now have.)
